response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including some Java and JVM-related work, but lacks focused, recent, or deep experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role. His strengths lie in full-stack and polyglot development, not JVM tooling depth.
strengths: Proven experience with Java in past roles (e.g., robotic arms, device orchestration)
Strong track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public talks
concerns: No recent or prominent experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise JVM frameworks
Primary modern stack is TypeScript/Node.js; JVM work appears legacy or incidental
Lacks demonstrable IDE internals or language tooling expertise (e.g., parsing, indexing, code analysis)
